<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"Split-screen 16:9 cinematic frame in modern social-first product photography style with tactile editorial energy, crisp whites #FFFFFF and warm beiges #F0E6D3 dominating, pink #D4536D accents popping against matte black #1A1A1A and light green #E8F4E8, golden hour twilight warmth, left half macro extreme close-up of elegant hands in real context uncapping sleek serum dropper bottle, index finger tensed mid-press on textured applicator tip, poised with potential energy about to dispense glossy serum droplet, airy macro texture details sharply in focus with shallow depth of field blurring subtle hand background, bright natural light caressing glossy surfaces with punchy highlights and clean shadows, right half locked wide shot of REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D leaning dynamically into camera with effortlessly cool smile, engaging gaze glancing toward product side mid-breath, set in airy modern newsroom on air live broadcast, vast glass wall streaked with rain softening to ethereal mist framing distant rainy city skyline glow through rain-slicked panes, sleek desks scattered with glowing terminals and monitors casting soft screen glows, polished corridor floors reflecting golden light, high-key illumination from flooding window light creating lifted shadows and immediate real-life vibrancy, subtle rim lights on REPORTER and product contours, eye-level framing with natural micro-movement energy implying handheld authenticity, shallow depth of field isolating subjects against bokeh newsroom bustle.","negativePrompt":"holograms, floating interfaces, text overlays, subtitles, blurry textures, heavy diffusion, dark shadows, overexposed highlights, deformed hands, extra fingers, ugly distortions, grainy low-res, wide depth of field, static lifeless poses","components":{"sceneDescription":"Split-screen composition blending macro product interaction on left with reporter engagement personality.","style":"Glossier-esque clean bright editorial product photography, true-to-life colors, minimal processing, screenshot-worthy vibrancy.","technical":"16:9 aspect ratio, ultra high resolution, sharp details, film grain, shallow depth of field.","atmosphere":"Fresh sensory effortlessly cool urgency, real-context magic, golden twilight mist softening the energy."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":["reporter"],"environmentTag":"modern_newsroom_golden_twilight_rain","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"#FFFFFF, #F0E6D3, #D4536D, #1A1A1A,
